svg.text: Microsoft Foundry Agent · MCP Tools · Stateful Conversations · End-to-End Auth · Private VNet · Observability

g.text: DATA SOURCES — AZURE AI SEARCH + COSMOS DB + DATABRICKS

svg.text: Content Safety · Rate Limiting · Managed Identity Auth

❶ User authenticates via Entra ID (OAuth 2.0/OIDC) → ❷ Token validated at Frontend/API → ❸ Request routed to Foundry Agent → ❹ Agent invokes MCP Tools → ❺ Tools query Azure AI Search & Cosmos DB → ❻ Telemetry emitted to Azure Monitor
